nasb.text: They gathered it morning by morning, every man as much as he should eat; but when the sun grew hot, it would melt.

esv.text: Morning by morning they gathered it, each as much as he could eat; but when the sun grew hot, it melted.

cnv.text: 他們每天早晨都按著各人的食量去收取；太陽一發熱，就融化了。

ccb.text: 于是，百姓每天早晨出营拾取食物，各人按着所需分量拾取，到太阳升起后，食物就融化了。
